puzzle.hint: An attribute of Allah meaning He constantly accepts repentance
puzzle.arabicVerse: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَٱسْتَغْفِرْهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ تَوَّابًۢا
puzzle.verse: 110:3 - Then exalt [Him] with praise of your Lord and ask forgiveness of Him. Indeed, He is ever Accepting of Repentance.
